economic_notes: TNDLP has entered into joint venture agreements providing support and construction services to various industries. TBDC operates Tahltan Centre Ltd. (grocery store and gas bar) and Stikine River Song Cafe and General Store Ltd. (seasonal motel and restaurant) in Telegraph Creek, BC. Ongoing wildfire rebuilding efforts from 2018 Alkali Lake wildfire. Band received 27% of revenue from ISC and 20% from FNHA.
notes: Audit is qualified for multiple reasons: (1) PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations not yet assessed; (2) Stikine River Song Cafe and General Store Ltd. and Tahltan Centre Ltd. should be consolidated but are accounted for using modified equity method; (3) 33.3% interests in TNDLP, TNDC, and TLC cannot be confirmed as shared control; (4) 33.3% interest in Tahltan Heritage Trust cannot be confirmed as portfolio investment vs partnership; (5) tangible capital asset cumulative opening balances prior to 2015 cannot be sufficiently audited. Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023, not 2024. Province is BC (Telegraph Creek, BC). Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($3,611,571) + FNHA ($2,616,277) + CMHC ($127,705) + Ministry of Children and Family Development ($370,603) + Ministry of Justice ($331,498) + Ottawa Trust ($12,046) + BCFN Gaming ($200 note: BCFN treated as other) = ISC+FNHA+CMHC+MCFD+MOJ+Ottawa = $7,069,700; BCFN Gaming Revenue Sharing LP treated as other/OSR. Segmented information note 21 was cut off in the provided text so departmental expense breakdown uses consolidated statement of operations figures.
